name: Crockpot Seasoned Beef in Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish.
2. Cut the round steak into cubes.
3. Toss the meat cubes with the flour mixture until evenly coated.
4. Brown the meat cubes in a little hot oil over medium heat.
5. Place the browned meat cubes in the crockpot.
6. Add sliced onions, Worcestershire sauce, curry powder, molasses, ginger, and water to the crockpot.
7. Cover and slow cook for 6 hours.
8. Just before serving, stir together sour cream and horseradish.
9. Stir the mixture into the crockpot.
10. Serve with rice, peas, and a cottage cheese/pear salad.
